description_long: This is a modern, multi-story residential house with a boxy, geometric design and a flat roof. The structure features a strong emphasis on black and white color blocking, with large rectangular windows and open sections that suggest balconies or terraces. The front facade is characterized by a combination of recessed and protruding volumes, with some wooden panel accents visible. The house appears to be divided into two main units, each with its own entrance and a mirrored layout, separated by a central wall. The rear and side views reveal additional outdoor spaces and a consistent use of horizontal and vertical lines. The overall design is minimalist, with clean edges and a focus on functional, urban living.
description: A modern, boxy two-unit house with flat roofs, large windows, and a striking black-and-white color scheme. Features include geometric facades, wooden accents, and multiple balconies or terraces.
description_view_0: Front view showing two main entrances, large windows, and wooden panel accents, with a clear division between the two units.
description_view_1: Side/rear view dominated by dark surfaces, with less visible detail and some outdoor spaces or terraces apparent.
description_view_2: Back view highlighting the mirrored layout of the two units, flat roofs, and additional outdoor areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side/rear view, mostly dark with minimal visible features, showing the overall massing and some vertical elements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryways with minimalistic doors, no visible porch, and subtle wooden panel accents
